repo.description: ROS 2 bridge for LeRobot mobile base, arm and sensors.

terms.context_snippet: ROS 2 bridge for [LeRobot](https://github.com/huggingface/lerobot) — enabling seamless control of [LeRobot’s mobile base, arm, and sensors](https://github.com/astroyat/lerobot-ros/blob/main/media/lidar.jpg) within the ROS 2 ecosystem.
